name: Saute' Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, trim, and slice the broccoli on a bias into 3-inch lengths.
2. Place oil in a wok and heat to smoking point. Add the broccoli to the wok and stir fry.
3. Stir in soya sauce, sugar, and salt.
4. Add 1/4 cup water. Cover the wok.
5. Cook the broccoli for 7.5 minutes. Lift the cover occasionally during cooking to stir the broccoli so that it cooks evenly on all sides.
